languages.text: "Я распоряжусь немедленно разослать сообщения благородным домам. Мы верны лишь вам и никому не позволим в этом усомниться".
"I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."
languages.original_text: "Я распоряжусь немедленно разослать сообщения благородным домам. Мы верны лишь вам и никому не позволим в этом усомниться".

traits.locale_text: "I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."
"I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you can't think... We would never forget that, even for a moment!"
"I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."
"I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."

languages.text: 「おぬし、忘れてはならぬ。一瞬たりとも忘れることなどない！」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you can't think... We would never forget that, even for a moment!"

languages.text: "Soylu hanelere derhâl haber verilmesini emredeceğim. Sadakatimiz yalnızca size aittir. Kimsenin bunu sorgulamasına izin vermeyeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."

traits.locale_text: "Soylu hanelere derhâl haber verilmesini emredeceğim. Sadakatimiz yalnızca size aittir. Kimsenin bunu sorgulamasına izin vermeyeceğiz."

languages.text: “我会立刻下令通知各大贵族家族。我们的忠诚只属于您，我们绝不会让任何人质疑这一点。”
languages.original_text: "I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."

traits.locale_text: “我会立刻下令通知各大贵族家族。我们的忠诚只属于您，我们绝不会让任何人质疑这一点。”

languages.text: "Ich lasse die Adelshäuser umgehend informieren. Unsere Loyalität gilt allein Euch ... daran soll niemand zweifeln."
languages.original_text: "I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."

traits.locale_text: "Ich lasse die Adelshäuser umgehend informieren. Unsere Loyalität gilt allein Euch ... daran soll niemand zweifeln."

languages.text: « Les familles nobles en seront informées sur le champ. Vous {mf|seul|seule} pouvez compter sur notre loyauté, nous ne manquerons pas de le rappeler aux autres. »
languages.original_text: "I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."

traits.locale_text: « Les familles nobles en seront informées sur le champ. Vous {mf|seul|seule} pouvez compter sur notre loyauté, nous ne manquerons pas de le rappeler aux autres. »

languages.text: «Daré la orden de notificar a las casas nobles de inmediato. Nuestra lealtad solo le pertenece a usted, y no permitiremos que nadie la cuestione».
languages.original_text: "I'll give the order to notify the noble houses immediately. Our loyalty belongs to you alone — we won't let anyone question that."

traits.locale_text: «Daré la orden de notificar a las casas nobles de inmediato. Nuestra lealtad solo le pertenece a usted, y no permitiremos que nadie la cuestione».
